creator: jdc@koitsu.org
text:
Update sysutils/mcelog from 1.0pre2 to 1.0pre3.

	Verified build + usability testing (via mcelog --no-dmi --ascii)
	with an older Intel MCE.

Fix: Apply below patch.

	Once a PR number is generated, the patch will also be available for
	download here:

	http://jdc.koitsu.org/freebsd/{prnum}/

	Due to the "patching of patches" complexity (hard to read diffs, etc.),
	if a tarball of the updated sysutils/mcelog directory is needed, just
	let me know.
